title.source: Setting up SSO login options and user/identity verification methods
title.target: Setting up SSO login options and user/identity verification methods

body:0001.source: What are SSO and verification methods?
body:0001.target: What are SSO and verification methods?

body:0002.source: By default, users must confirm their email via a code to create an account. This manual verification can be a barrier to participation. With SSO (Single Sign-On) options like Google, Facebook, or Microsoft Entra, users can register and log in with a single click, making the process faster and more user-friendly.
body:0002.target: By default, users must confirm their email via a code to create an account. This manual verification can be a barrier to participation. With SSO (Single Sign-On) options like Google, Facebook, or Microsoft Entra, users can register and log in with a single click, making the process faster and more user-friendly.

body:0003.source: For projects that require stronger identity verification, you can add:
body:0003.target: For projects that require stronger identity verification, you can add:

body:0004.source: Unique code verification for specific participants
body:0004.target: Unique code verification for specific participants

body:0005.source: National ID authentication systems (available in select countries)
body:0005.target: National ID authentication systems (available in select countries)

body:0006.source: Access to these features depends on your subscription plan.
body:0006.target: Access to these features depends on your subscription plan.

body:0009.source: These options provide an easy, low-barrier login experience. When enabled:
body:0009.target: These options provide an easy, low-barrier login experience. When enabled:

body:0010.source: Users can register or log in by clicking a single button.
body:0010.target: Users can register or log in by clicking a single button.

body:0011.source: Their email is automatically verified through the selected provider (Google or Facebook).
body:0011.target: Their email is automatically verified through the selected provider (Google or Facebook).

body:0012.source: To enable these options, contact the Support team using the chat bubble in your platform.
body:0012.target: To enable these options, contact the Support team using the chat bubble in your platform.

body:0014.source: This is ideal if your organization already uses Microsoft accounts internally.
body:0014.target: This is ideal if your organization already uses Microsoft accounts internally.

body:0016.source: Add Microsoft Entra login to a public page for general use (as a log in option or through a link below the log in options as shown in the images below)
body:0016.target: Add Microsoft Entra login to a public page for general use (as a log in option or through a link below the log in options as shown in the images below)

body:0017.source: Restrict it to a private URL visible only to your staff
body:0017.target: Restrict it to a private URL visible only to your staff

body:0018.source: To set it up, send the following to Support:
body:0018.target: To set it up, send the following to Support:

body:0021.source: Login mechanism name (e.g., “Sign up with city account”)
body:0021.target: Login mechanism name (e.g., “Sign up with city account”)

body:0022.source: (Optional) Logo URL for the login button
body:0022.target: (Optional) Logo URL for the login button

body:0023.source: Support will activate the login option for you.
body:0023.target: Support will activate the login option for you.

body:0025.source: We support integration with several national systems for secure identity verification:
body:0025.target: We support integration with several national systems for secure identity verification:

body:0032.source: Limit participation to citizens of a specific country
body:0032.target: Limit participation to citizens of a specific country

body:0033.source: Prevent users from creating multiple accounts
body:0033.target: Prevent users from creating multiple accounts

body:0034.source: Ensure participants register using their real identity
body:0034.target: Ensure participants register using their real identity

body:0036.source: Contact Support at least 2–3 months in advance to plan the integration.
body:0036.target: Contact Support at least 2–3 months in advance to plan the integration.

body:0037.source: Our team will work with you and national authorities to get the necessary permissions.
body:0037.target: Our team will work with you and national authorities to get the necessary permissions.

body:0038.source: Once configured, users will verify themselves via the national system when registering or attempting to interact with a restricted project.
body:0038.target: Once configured, users will verify themselves via the national system when registering or attempting to interact with a restricted project.

body:0039.source: ⚠️ We do not store or access national ID numbers. The national system handles all authentication.
body:0039.target: ⚠️ We do not store or access national ID numbers. The national system handles all authentication.

body:0040.source: ⚠️ We may receive basic information (like first name, last name, email) to populate the user’s profile, additional data like age or residence is not transferred.
body:0040.target: ⚠️ We may receive basic information (like first name, last name, email) to populate the user’s profile, additional data like age or residence is not transferred.

body:0042.source: Create a smart group for verified users via national authentication.
body:0042.target: Create a smart group for verified users via national authentication.

body:0043.source: Limit project visibility or participation based on this group.
body:0043.target: Limit project visibility or participation based on this group.

body:0044.source: In France, FranceConnect can also be used as an SSO method, users don’t need to create a new account on your platform.
body:0044.target: In France, FranceConnect can also be used as an SSO method, users don’t need to create a new account on your platform.

body:0051.source: No setup required beyond Support request
body:0051.target: No setup required beyond Support request
